ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "catalog_id" TEXT /* Reference to the compound's catalog ID */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the compound */,
  "stereochemistry" TEXT /* Stereochemical description of the compound */,
  "sample_mw" REAL /* Molecular weight of the compound */,
  "purity" REAL /* Purity percentage of the compound */,
  "po" TEXT /* Purchase order number */,
  "salt_name" TEXT /* Name of the salt, if applicable */,
  "salt_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of the salt in the compound */,
  "mw_salt" REAL /* Molecular weight of the salt, if applicable */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the compound in microliters */,
  "concentration" INTEGER /* Concentration of the compound in millimolar */,
  "plate_id" TEXT /* ID of the plate where the compound is located */,
  "well" TEXT /* Well location on the plate */,
  "smiles" TEXT /* SMILES string representation of the compound */,
  "name" TEXT /* Common name of the compound */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date when the shipment was made */,
  "estimated_arrival_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of arrival */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the shipment */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Name of the carrier or shipping company */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number provided by the carrier */,
  "site_from" INTEGER /* ID of the site from which the shipment originates */,
  "site_to" INTEGER /* ID of the site to which the shipment is sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_po FOREIGN KEY ("po") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("po_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_site_to FOREIGN KEY ("site_to") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_site_from FOREIGN KEY ("site_from") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_catalog_id FOREIGN KEY ("catalog_id") REFERENCES catalogs ("catalog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "catalogs" (
  "catalog_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each compound in the catalog */,
  "compound_name" TEXT /* Name of the compound */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the compound */,
  "stereochemistry" TEXT /* Stereochemical description of the compound */,
  "mw" REAL /* Molecular weight of the compound */,
  "purity" REAL /* Purity percentage of the compound */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the compound was added to the catalog */,
  "date_modified" TEXT /* Date when the compound's information was last modified */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier or vendor */,
  "batch_id" TEXT /* Batch ID of the compound */,
  "lot_number" TEXT /* Lot number of the compound */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("catalog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plates" (
  "plate_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each plate */,
  "plate_name" TEXT /* Name of the plate */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plate's purpose or contents */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the plate */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the plate was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the plate */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the plate was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wells" (
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well */,
  "plate_id" TEXT /* Reference to the plate where the well is located */,
  "well_location" TEXT /* Location of the well on the plate (e.g., 05_A) */,
  "compound_id" TEXT /* ID of the compound stored in the well */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the well */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the well was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the well */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the well was last modified */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the compound in the well in microliters */,
  "concentration" INTEGER /* Concentration of the compound in the well in millimolar */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_plate_id FOREIGN KEY ("plate_id") REFERENCES plates ("plate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES catalogs ("catalog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the research site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the research site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the site */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the site */,
  "address" TEXT /* Detailed address of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_orders" (
  "po_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "po_number" TEXT /* Purchase order number */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the purchase order was created */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research site that placed the order */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the purchase order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the purchase order */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the purchase order */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the purchase order was approved */,
  "delivered_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who delivered the purchase order */,
  "delivered_date" TEXT /* Date when the purchase order was delivered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("po_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_delivered_by FOREIGN KEY ("delivered_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "compound_id" TEXT /* ID of the compound being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the compound */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the compound was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, use) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES catalogs ("catalog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_handling" (
  "safety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety and handling record */,
  "compound_id" TEXT /* ID of the compound */,
  "hazard_class" TEXT /* Hazard class of the compound */,
  "hazard_statement" TEXT /* Hazard statement for the compound */,
  "precautionary_statement" TEXT /* Precautionary statement for the compound */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions for the compound */,
  "personal_protection_equipment" TEXT /* Personal protection equipment required for handling */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("safety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_handling_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES catalogs ("catalog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_compliance" (
  "regulatory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory compliance record */,
  "compound_id" TEXT /* ID of the compound */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Regulatory body overseeing the compound */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Compliance status of the compound */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date when the compound was last compliant */,
  "compliance_document" TEXT /* Link to the compliance document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulatory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_compliance_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES catalogs ("catalog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "literature_references" (
  "literature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each literature reference */,
  "compound_id" TEXT /* ID of the compound */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the reference */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the reference */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the reference was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("literature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_literature_references_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES catalogs ("catalog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "compound_id" TEXT /* ID of the compound */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES catalogs ("catalog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Detailed address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qc_results" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each QC result */,
  "compound_id" TEXT /* ID of the compound */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test */,
  "tested_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who performed the test */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qc_results_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES catalogs ("catalog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "physical_chemical_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "compound_id" TEXT /* ID of the compound */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_physical_chemical_properties_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES catalogs ("catalog_id")
)
